sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA No. 344 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on CMA No. 2621/2024 (Exemption) 2. For order on CMA No. 2622/2024 (Stay) 2. For hearing of Main Case 10.02.2026 None present This matter is pending since 2024 without any progress, even notice has not been issued till date. Applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the Applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported in PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad PS
